name: chart-pie-donut-active
visual_summary: ChartPieDonutActive is a data visualization component with an active state, used to display pie or donut charts with a dynamic and engaging experience in interactive dashboards or data-rich applications.
generation_prompt:

Tags: donut chart, pie chart, data visualization, interactive, dashboard, chart

- Export as default with sensible prop types
